metadata.description: Production-readiness toolkit for vibe-coded apps: a full technical-due-diligence audit and a fast 13-layer self-check.

plugins.name: vibekiller
plugins.description: Kill the vibe-coding gap. /audit runs a multi-domain due-diligence audit (hard-stops H1-H11, blind-spots B1-B19, 13 domains, deterministic verdict); /vibe-to-prod is a fast guided 13-layer readiness self-check.
